payload.answer: Compiled the context into small, traceable reference memory cards without creating user-profile facts.

entity_resolution.reason: The input contains general design guidance rather than a user-specific entity requiring resolution.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small.
Atomic memory cards should be traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall in an AI memory system.
The application database must own lifecycle state in an AI memory system.
The application database must own conflict state in an AI memory system.

details: Created six atomic reference memory cards.
Preserved modal ambiguity for the semantic index claim by using 'can improve'.
No superseded or deleted facts were present.
